compiled_state.title: RED+GREEN: test and implement overlay findings merge into canonical reviewer-findings.json
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Testing mode: RED then GREEN

RED — write failing tests in tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-runner.sh:
1. When security overlay ran: canonical reviewer-findings.json (written by write-reviewer-findings.sh) contains all findings from reviewer-findings-security-red.json AND reviewer-findings-security-blue.json merged alongside tier findings; neither source is clobbered.
2. When performance overlay ran: reviewer-findings-performance.json findings appear in canonical reviewer-findings.json.
3. When test-quality overlay ran: reviewer-findings-test-quality.json findings appear in canonical reviewer-findings.json.
4. When no overlays ran: canonical reviewer-findings.json contains only tier findings (no regression).

GREEN — implement merge step in plugins/dso/scripts/ci-llm-review-runner.sh:
After all overlay slot files are written (after blue-team serial step), collect non-empty slot files and merge their 'findings' arrays and per-dimension 'scores' (take min per dimension to be conservative) into the FINDINGS_JSON before passing to write-reviewer-findings.sh. The merge must be additive: overlay findings are appended, not overwritten; scores are lowered only if an overlay score is lower.

Done criteria: all new RED tests pass; existing 22 + overlay dispatch tests pass; review-status=passed when all overlays return clean findings; review-status=failed when any overlay returns a critical finding.

Files touched: plugins/dso/scripts/ci-llm-review-runner.sh, tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-runner.sh
